</row>

<row gap="medium">

 

 

 
</row>

</column>

---

Crafters choose tattoos that represent their dedication and skill in their chosen field. Such tattoos might adorn the arm, fingers, or eyes, and they take the form of artistic patterns or depict tools of the trade, such as anvils, paintbrushes, or trowels. You gain a +2 item bonus to [Crafting](/Skills.aspx?ID=4) checks. Furthermore, when you roll a critical failure on a Crafting check to [Earn Income](/Actions.aspx?ID=23), treat it as a failure instead.

**Activate** <actions string="" /> 1 minute ([concentrate](/Traits.aspx?ID=561), [manipulate](/Traits.aspx?ID=645)) **Frequency** once per day;   **Effect** The tattoo casts [_creation_](/Spells.aspx?ID=54). You choose the item and its appearance, and whether the spell is 4th or 5th rank.

<column gap="tiny">

</column>

<title
    level="1"
    right="Item 2"
    pfs="Standard"
>
[Triangular Teeth](/Equipment.aspx?ID=2221)
</title>

<traits>
<trait label="Invested" url="/Traits.aspx?ID=98" />
<trait label="Magical" url="/Traits.aspx?ID=103" />
<trait label="Tattoo" url="/Traits.aspx?ID=262" />
</traits>

<column gap="tiny">

**Source** [Treasure Vault (Remastered)](/Sources.aspx?ID=191) pg. 122

**Price** 33 gp

<row gap="medium">

**Usage** tattooed on the body

</row>

<row gap="medium">

 

 

 
</row>

</column>

---

Rows of triangles symbolizing shark teeth protect you from danger and enable you to take fierce retaliation against those who try to harm you. Seafarers, especially those on the seas of Minata, wear these tattoos in patterns, with multiple rows of regular triangles. You gain a +1 item bonus to [Survival](/Skills.aspx?ID=16) checks to navigate bodies of water.

**Activate** <actions string="Reaction" /> ([concentrate](/Traits.aspx?ID=561)) **Frequency** once per day; **Trigger** You would be hit by an attack against your AC;  **Effect** You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to AC against the attack, or a +2 circumstance bonus if the attacker is in water or has the [amphibious](/Traits.aspx?ID=207), [aquatic](/Traits.aspx?ID=168), or [water](/Traits.aspx?ID=165) trait. Whether the attack hits or misses, you gain a +2 status bonus to damage with the next Strike you make against the attacker before the end of your next turn.

<column gap="tiny">

</column>
name: Triangular Teeth

markdown:
**Source** [Treasure Vault (Remastered)](/Sources.aspx?ID=191) pg. 122 **Price** 60 gp **Usage** tattooed on the body --- The name of your beloved adorns this stylized image of a heart. An _unbreakable heart_ tattoo can be received only at the end of a successful [_heartbond_](/Rituals.aspx?ID=33) ritual, serving as your token. The other participant can have a token other than a tattoo if they wish. If you have more than one heartbond, each _unbreakable heart_ you have serves as a token for only one of them. The love exuding from you grants you a +1 item bonus to [Diplomacy](/Skills.aspx?ID=6) checks. When you use _heartbond's_ activity to learn your beloved's present state, you can also grant them a small gift, choosing from the following options each time. Make your choice after learning their state.
  • Your beloved gains 5 temporary Hit Points that last for 10 minutes.
  • The tattoo casts [_guidance_](/Spells.aspx?ID=142) on your beloved.
  • The tattoo casts [_stabilize_](/Spells.aspx?ID=307) on your beloved.
  • The tattoo casts [_light_](/Spells.aspx?ID=171) on your beloved's token from _heartbond_.
name: Unbreakable Heart

**Usage** tattooed on the body

</row>

<row gap="medium">

 

 

 
</row>

</column>

---

These tattoos were first created using designs and techniques from the seven Shoanti clans. Each clan is known for one tattoo in particular. The clans would seal alliances in ancient days by tattooing their emblems on members of other clans to symbolically share their gifts. Though these tattoos are respected, the clans reserve their most prestigious symbols for true members of the clan.

The tattoo allows you to understand and speak [Shoanti](/Languages.aspx?ID=171). If you already know that language, you instead gain a +1 item bonus on [Diplomacy](/Skills.aspx?ID=39) checks you make when speaking Shoanti to someone who understands it.

**Activate** <actions string="" /> The actions required to Activate the tattoo are the same as those needed to cast its spell;  **Frequency** once per day;   **Effect** The tattoo casts its spell.

---

These tattoos were first created using designs and techniques from the seven Shoanti clans. Each clan is known for one tattoo in particular. The clans would seal alliances in ancient days by tattooing their emblems on members of other clans to symbolically share their gifts. Though these tattoos are respected, the clans reserve their most prestigious symbols for true members of the clan.

The tattoo allows you to understand and speak [Shoanti](/Languages.aspx?ID=171). If you already know that language, you instead gain a +1 item bonus on [Diplomacy](/Skills.aspx?ID=39) checks you make when speaking Shoanti to someone who understands it.

**Activate** <actions string="" /> The actions required to Activate the tattoo are the same as those needed to cast its spell;  **Frequency** once per day;   **Effect** The tattoo casts its spell.

<title
    level="1"
    right="Item 4+"
    pfs="Standard"
>
[Wildwood Ink](/Equipment.aspx?ID=2224)
</title>

<traits>
<trait label="Invested" url="/Traits.aspx?ID=98" />
<trait label="Primal" url="/Traits.aspx?ID=134" />
<trait label="Tattoo" url="/Traits.aspx?ID=262" />
</traits>

<column gap="tiny">

**Source** [Treasure Vault (Remastered)](/Sources.aspx?ID=191) pg. 123

<row gap="medium">

**Usage** tattooed on the body

</row>

<row gap="medium">

 

 

 
</row>

</column>

---

These curving, delicate designs resemble leaves, vines, or creepers, most often wrapped around a limb, ear, or throat, or curled around specific muscles. They help you blend in among plants. You gain a +1 item bonus to [Stealth](/Skills.aspx?ID=15) checks, which increases to +2 in forests.

**Activate** <actions string="Reaction" /> ([concentrate](/Traits.aspx?ID=561)) **Frequency** once per day; **Trigger** A creature would detect you by [Seeking](/Actions.aspx?ID=84); **Requirements** You're in a forest or similar natural area; **Effect** The tattoo casts [_one with plants_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1618) to turn you into a plant before you can be noticed. The duration of this spell is 10 minutes. 

If you’ve already Activated the tattoo, you can supply a separate casting of _one with plants_ to recharge the tattoo instead of having the spell’s normal effect. This allows you to Activate the tattoo again in the same day. You can do so multiple times each day, but only as many times as you continue to cast one with plants to recharge the tattoo after each use.

<column gap="tiny">

</column>

level="2"
right="Item 4"
pfs="Standard"
>
Wildwood Ink
</title>

<traits>

</traits>

<column gap="tiny">

**Source** [Treasure Vault (Remastered)](/Sources.aspx?ID=191) pg. 123

**Price** 80 gp

<row gap="medium">

</row>

</column>

<title
level="2"
right="Item 10"
pfs="Standard"
>
Wildwood Ink (Greater)
</title>

<traits>

</traits>

<column gap="tiny">

**Source** [Treasure Vault (Remastered)](/Sources.aspx?ID=191) pg. 123

**Price** 900 gp

<row gap="medium">

</row>

</column>

---

The item bonus to Stealth checks is +2, or +3 in forests. _One with plants_ lasts up to 1 hour.

<title
level="2"
right="Item 17"
pfs="Standard"
>
Wildwood Ink (Major)
</title>

<traits>

</traits>

<column gap="tiny">

**Source** [Treasure Vault (Remastered)](/Sources.aspx?ID=191) pg. 123

**Price** 15,000 gp

<row gap="medium">

</row>

</column>

---

The item bonus to Stealth checks is +3, or +4 in forests. _One with plants_ lasts up to 8 hours.
name: Wildwood Ink

You can do so multiple times each day, but only as many times as you continue to cast one with plants to recharge the tattoo after each use.

<title
    level="1"
    right="Item 4+"
    pfs="Standard"
>

<traits>
<trait label="Invested" url="/Traits.aspx?ID=98" />
<trait label="Primal" url="/Traits.aspx?ID=134" />
<trait label="Tattoo" url="/Traits.aspx?ID=262" />
</traits>

<column gap="tiny">

**Source** [Treasure Vault (Remastered)](/Sources.aspx?ID=191) pg. 123

<row gap="medium">

**Usage** tattooed on the body

</row>

<row gap="medium">

 

 

 
</row>

</column>

---

These curving, delicate designs resemble leaves, vines, or creepers, most often wrapped around a limb, ear, or throat, or curled around specific muscles. They help you blend in among plants. You gain a +1 item bonus to [Stealth](/Skills.aspx?ID=15) checks, which increases to +2 in forests.

**Activate** <actions string="Reaction" /> ([concentrate](/Traits.aspx?ID=561)) **Frequency** once per day; **Trigger** A creature would detect you by [Seeking](/Actions.aspx?ID=84); **Requirements** You're in a forest or similar natural area; **Effect** The tattoo casts [_one with plants_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1618) to turn you into a plant before you can be noticed. The duration of this spell is 10 minutes. 

If you’ve already Activated the tattoo, you can supply a separate casting of _one with plants_ to recharge the tattoo instead of having the spell’s normal effect. This allows you to Activate the tattoo again in the same day. You can do so multiple times each day, but only as many times as you continue to cast one with plants to recharge the tattoo after each use.

markdown:
**Source** [Treasure Vault (Remastered)](/Sources.aspx?ID=191) pg. 123 **Usage** tattooed on the body --- A massive pattern resembling [dragon](/MonsterFamilies.aspx?ID=395) wings stretched to their full span crosses your body. The tattoo is typically inked on the upper back. Though the representation can be highly stylized, each wyrm’s wingspan tattoo depicts the wings of a particular type of dragon. You gain resistance 5 to the damage type matching the tradition of the dragon your tattoo depicts.
  • [**Arcane**](/SpellLists.aspx?Tradition=1) [force](/Traits.aspx?ID=610)
  • **[Divine](/SpellLists.aspx?Tradition=2)** [spirit](/Traits.aspx?ID=737)
  • **[Occult](/SpellLists.aspx?Tradition=3)** [mental](/Traits.aspx?ID=647)
  • [**Primal**](/SpellLists.aspx?Tradition=4) [fire](/Traits.aspx?ID=604)
**Activate** ([concentrate](/Traits.aspx?ID=561)) **Frequency** once per day; **Effect** The tattoo casts the [_dragon wings_](/Spells.aspx?ID=2104) focus spell on you. Wyrm's Wingspan **Source** [Treasure Vault (Remastered)](/Sources.aspx?ID=191) pg. 123 **Price** 700 gp Wyrm's Wingspan (Greater) **Source** [Treasure Vault (Remastered)](/Sources.aspx?ID=191) pg. 123 **Price** 2,800 gp --- The resistance increases to 10. The tattoo gains the following activation. **Activate** ([concentrate](/Traits.aspx?ID=561)) **Frequency** once per day; **Effect** The tattoo casts [_dragon form_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1502) on you, turning you into the type of dragon represented by the tattoo. Wyrm's Wingspan (Major) **Source** [Treasure Vault (Remastered)](/Sources.aspx?ID=191) pg. 123 **Price** 13,500 gp --- The resistance increases to 15. The tattoo gains the activation of the greater type, but the _dragon form_ is heightened to 8th rank.
name: Wyrm's Wingspan

markdown:
**Source** [Treasure Vault (Remastered)](/Sources.aspx?ID=191) pg. 124 **Usage** affixed to armor or a weapon --- This silver disc displays an ever-changing etching of an [animal](/Traits.aspx?ID=9). When you affix the _beastmaster's sigil_, the animal settles into a single form based on where you affix it, showing the animal the item can summon when affixed that way. The spell DC of any spell cast by activating this item is 19. A weapon can benefit from only the melee weapon benefit or ranged weapon benefit. A [thrown](/Traits.aspx?ID=195) melee weapon gets the melee weapon benefit, and a [combination](/Traits.aspx?ID=417) weapon gets only one benefit, which you choose when you affix the spellheart. If it's unclear which one should apply, the GM decides.
  • **Armor** The sigil grants you a +1 item bonus to saving throws against [poison](/Traits.aspx?ID=126).
  • **Melee Weapon** The sigil grants you a +1 item bonus to [Athletics](/Skills.aspx?ID=3) checks to [Trip](/Actions.aspx?ID=40).
  • **Ranged Weapon** If you critically hit with the affixed weapon, and the target is adjacent to a creature summoned with the sigil, the target takes 1d6 [persistent bleed damage](/Conditions.aspx?ID=29).
**Activate** Cast a Spell; **Effect** You cast [_tame_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1014). Beastmaster's Sigil **Source** [Treasure Vault (Remastered)](/Sources.aspx?ID=191) pg. 124 **Price** 160 gp --- **Activate** Cast a Spell; **Frequency** once per day; **Effect** You cast 2nd-rank [_summon animal_](/Spells.aspx?ID=316) to summon a [hunting spider](/Monsters.aspx?ID=3207) (armor), [wolf](/Monsters.aspx?ID=415) (melee weapon), or [bat swarm](/Monsters.aspx?ID=45) (ranged weapon). Beastmaster's Sigil (Greater) **Source** [Treasure Vault (Remastered)](/Sources.aspx?ID=191) pg. 124 **Price** 360 gp --- The spell DC is 23 and the bleed damage is 2d6. **Activate** Cast a Spell; **Frequency** once per day; **Effect** You cast 3rd-rank _summon animal_ to summon a [giant monitor lizard](/Monsters.aspx?ID=289) (armor), [boar](/Monsters.aspx?ID=2854) (melee), or [giant bat](/Monsters.aspx?ID=46) (ranged). Beastmaster's Sigil (Major) **Source** [Treasure Vault (Remastered)](/Sources.aspx?ID=191) pg. 124 **Price** 700 gp --- The spell DC is 25, the item bonuses are +2, and the bleed damage is 3d6. **Activate** Cast a Spell; **Frequency** once per day; **Effect** You cast 4th-rank _summon animal_ to summon a [giant scorpion](/Monsters.aspx?ID=356) (armor), [dire wolf](/Monsters.aspx?ID=416) (melee), or [fen mosquito swarm](/Monsters.aspx?ID=732) (ranged).
name: Beastmaster's Sigil

markdown:
**Source** [Treasure Vault (Remastered)](/Sources.aspx?ID=191) pg. 124 **Usage** affixed to armor or a weapon --- This silver disc displays an ever-changing etching of an [animal](/Traits.aspx?ID=9). When you affix the _beastmaster's sigil_, the animal settles into a single form based on where you affix it, showing the animal the item can summon when affixed that way. The spell DC of any spell cast by activating this item is 19. A weapon can benefit from only the melee weapon benefit or ranged weapon benefit. A [thrown](/Traits.aspx?ID=195) melee weapon gets the melee weapon benefit, and a [combination](/Traits.aspx?ID=417) weapon gets only one benefit, which you choose when you affix the spellheart. If it's unclear which one should apply, the GM decides.
  • **Armor** The sigil grants you a +1 item bonus to saving throws against [poison](/Traits.aspx?ID=126).
  • **Melee Weapon** The sigil grants you a +1 item bonus to [Athletics](/Skills.aspx?ID=3) checks to [Trip](/Actions.aspx?ID=40).
  • **Ranged Weapon** If you critically hit with the affixed weapon, and the target is adjacent to a creature summoned with the sigil, the target takes 1d6 [persistent bleed damage](/Conditions.aspx?ID=29).
**Activate** Cast a Spell; **Effect** You cast [_tame_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1014). markdown:
**Source** [Treasure Vault (Remastered)](/Sources.aspx?ID=191) pg. 125 **Usage** affixed to armor or a weapon --- Appearing as vibrant as the day they were picked, this cluster of flowers is arranged in a small spray, tied with a red satin ribbon. The spell DC of any spell cast by activating this item is 24.
  • **Armor** You gain the ability to speak with flowers, as [_speak with plants_](/Spells.aspx?ID=294).
  • **Weapon** ([disease](/Traits.aspx?ID=46)) After you cast a [plant](/Traits.aspx?ID=125) spell by activating the posy, pollen coats your weapon. Your next Strike causes the target to be [sickened 1](/Conditions.aspx?ID=34) on a hit (sickened 2 on a critical hit). If the creature attempts to recover, it sneezes rather than retching (rolling against the spellheart's spell DC). If you don't make a Strike by the end of your next turn, the pollen becomes inert. Plant creatures are immune.
**Activate** Cast a Spell; **Effect** [_tangle vine_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1713) Brightbloom Posy **Source** [Treasure Vault (Remastered)](/Sources.aspx?ID=191) pg. 125 **Price** 450 gp --- **Activate** Cast a Spell; **Frequency** once per day; **Effect** You cast [_soothing blossoms_](/Spells.aspx?ID=999). Brightbloom Posy (Greater) **Source** [Treasure Vault (Remastered)](/Sources.aspx?ID=191) pg. 125 **Price** 1,300 gp --- The spell DC is 28. **Activate** Cast a Spell; **Frequency** once per day; **Effect** You cast _soothing blossoms_. **Activate** Cast a Spell; **Frequency** once per day; **Effect** You cast [_petal storm_](/Spells.aspx?ID=967). Brightbloom Posy (Major) **Source** [Treasure Vault (Remastered)](/Sources.aspx?ID=191) pg. 125 **Price** 36,000 gp --- The spell DC is 41. **Activate** Cast a Spell; **Frequency** once per day; **Effect** You cast 6th-rank _petal storm_. **Activate** Cast a Spell; **Frequency** once per day; **Effect** You cast [_burning blossoms_](/Spells.aspx?ID=878).
name: Brightbloom Posy

markdown:
**Source** [Treasure Vault (Remastered)](/Sources.aspx?ID=191) pg. 125 **Usage** affixed to armor or a weapon --- The surface of this golden, heart-shaped locket is nearly worn through with cracks. If opened, it reveals a portrait of someone the bearer loved dearly and has lost. The spell DC of any spell cast by activating this item is 24.
  • **Armor** The _desolation locket_ numbs you to further despair, and you gain a +2 item bonus to saving throws against [emotion](/Traits.aspx?ID=590) effects.
  • **Weapon** (emotion, [mental](/Traits.aspx?ID=647)) After you cast a non-cantrip spell by activating the locket, you emanate an aura of hopelessness in a 5-foot [emanation](/Rules.aspx?ID=2387) until the start of your next turn. A creature that ends its turn in the aura must succeed at a Will saving throw against the locket’s spell DC or become [slowed](/Conditions.aspx?ID=92) 1 (slowed 2 on a critical failure) until the end of its next turn.
**Activate** Cast a Spell; **Effect** You cast [_haunting hymn_](/Spells.aspx?ID=924). Desolation Locket **Source** [Treasure Vault (Remastered)](/Sources.aspx?ID=191) pg. 125 **Price** 470 gp --- **Activate** Cast a Spell; **Frequency** once per day; **Effect** You cast [_fear_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1524). Desolation Locket (Greater) **Source** [Treasure Vault (Remastered)](/Sources.aspx?ID=191) pg. 125 **Price** 2,800 gp --- The item bonus when affixed to armor is +3, and the spell DC is 30. **Activate** Cast a Spell; **Frequency** once per day; **Effect** You cast 4th-rank _fear_. **Activate** Cast a Spell; **Frequency** once per day; **Effect** You cast [_wave of despair_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1757). Desolation Locket (Major) **Source** [Treasure Vault (Remastered)](/Sources.aspx?ID=191) pg. 125 **Price** 34,000 gp --- The item bonus when affixed to armor is +4; when you critically fail a saving throw against an emotion effect, you get a failure instead; and the spell DC is 41. **Activate** Cast a Spell; **Frequency** once per day; **Effect** You cast 7th-rank _wave of despair_. **Activate** Cast a Spell; **Frequency** once per day; **Effect** You cast [_canticle of everlasting grief_](/Spells.aspx?ID=879).
name: Desolation Locket

markdown:
**Source** [Treasure Vault (Remastered)](/Sources.aspx?ID=191) pg. 125 **Usage** affixed to armor or a weapon --- Mist fills the glass of this small circular hand mirror, creating strange patterns in the shifting gray wisps. The back of the mirror bears a flowing script engraving in an unknown language. The spell DC of any spell cast by activating this item is 23.
  • **Armor** After you cast an [illusion](/Traits.aspx?ID=629) spell by activating the mirror, choose one ally within 30 feet. That ally is [concealed](/Conditions.aspx?ID=62), as if seen in a misty mirror, until the end of your next turn.
  • **Weapon** After you cast an illusion spell by activating the mirror, illusory copies of the weapon swirl in the air around it. You’re affected by the [_thicket of knives_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1017) spell until the end of your next turn. The spell ends if you stop wielding the affixed weapon.
**Activate** Cast a Spell; **Effect** You cast [_forbidding ward_](/Spells.aspx?ID=126). Enigma Mirror **Source** [Treasure Vault (Remastered)](/Sources.aspx?ID=191) pg. 125 **Price** 325 gp --- **Activate** Cast a Spell; **Frequency** once per day; **Effect** You cast [_blur_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1455). Enigma Mirror (Greater) **Source** [Treasure Vault (Remastered)](/Sources.aspx?ID=191) pg. 125 **Price** 950 gp --- The spell DC is 27. **Activate** Cast a Spell; **Frequency** once per day; **Effect** You cast [_mirror's misfortune_](/Spells.aspx?ID=951). Enigma Mirror (Major) **Source** [Treasure Vault (Remastered)](/Sources.aspx?ID=191) pg. 125 **Price** 2,750 gp --- The spell DC is 30. **Activate** Cast a Spell; **Frequency** once per day; **Effect** You cast _mirror's misfortune_. **Activate** Cast a Spell; **Frequency** once per day; **Effect** You cast [_mirror malefactors_](/Spells.aspx?ID=950).
name: Enigma Mirror

markdown:
**Source** [Treasure Vault (Remastered)](/Sources.aspx?ID=191) pg. 125 **Usage** affixed to armor or a weapon --- This miniature wooden planchette is engraved with symbols designed to attract spirits. When affixed, the symbols begin to glow, and the planchette turns slightly insubstantial. The spell DC of any spell cast by activating this item is 29.
  • **Armor** After you cast a spell by activating the planchette, you gain [resistance](/Rules.aspx?ID=2312) 5 to all physical damage (except [_ghost touch_](/Equipment.aspx?ID=2840)) until the start of your next turn. Attacks by [incorporeal](/Traits.aspx?ID=632) creatures (such as a ghost’s ghostly hand) count as ghost touch.
  • **Weapon** After you cast a spell by activating the planchette, the affixed weapon gains the effects of the _ghost touch_ property rune until the end of your next turn.
**Activate** Cast a Spell; **Effect** You cast [_void warp_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1745). Ghostcaller's Planchette **Source** [Treasure Vault (Remastered)](/Sources.aspx?ID=191) pg. 125 **Price** 1,750 gp --- **Activate** Cast a Spell; **Frequency** once per day; **Effect** You cast [_invoke spirits_](/Spells.aspx?ID=937). Ghostcaller's Planchette (Greater) **Source** [Treasure Vault (Remastered)](/Sources.aspx?ID=191) pg. 125 **Price** 21,000 gp --- The resistance when affixed to armor is 10. When the planchette is affixed to a weapon, casting a spell by activating the planchette grants the weapon the effects of both the _ghost touch_ and [_greater vitalizing_](/Equipment.aspx?ID=2852) property runes. The spell DC is 38. **Activate** Cast a Spell; **Frequency** once per day; **Effect** You cast 7th-rank [_invoke spirits_](/Spells.aspx?ID=937). **Activate** Cast a Spell; **Frequency** once per day; **Effect** You cast [_tempest of shades_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1015).
name: Ghostcaller's Planchette

markdown:
**Source** [Treasure Vault (Remastered)](/Sources.aspx?ID=191) pg. 126 **Usage** affixed to armor or a weapon --- The golden religious symbol on the top of this spherical incense holder shifts its form to match the faith of its bearer. You gain no benefit from a judgment thurible if you don’t worship a deity. The spell DC of any spell cast by activating this item is 27.
  • **Armor** After you cast a spell by activating the thurible, the thurible casts 3rd-rank [_protection_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1641) on you, with a duration of 1 round.
  • **Weapon** After you cast a spell by activating the thurible, the weapon gains a rune that lasts until the end of your next turn. It gains the [_holy_](/Equipment.aspx?ID=2842) rune if your deity allows holy sanctification or the [_unholy_](/Equipment.aspx?ID=2851) rune if your deity allows unholy sanctification. If your deity allows both, you can choose which rune the weapon gains. If your deity allows neither, your weapon doesn’t gain a rune.
**Activate** Cast a Spell; **Effect** You cast [_divine lance_](/Spells.aspx?ID=84). Judgement Thurible **Source** [Treasure Vault (Remastered)](/Sources.aspx?ID=191) pg. 126 **Price** 975 gp --- **Activate** Cast a Spell; **Frequency** once per day; **Effect** You cast [_divine wrath_](/Spells.aspx?ID=86). Judgement Thurible (Greater) **Source** [Treasure Vault (Remastered)](/Sources.aspx?ID=191) pg. 126 **Price** 14,000 gp --- The additional damage from the rune granted by the thurible is 2d6, and the spell DC is 35. **Activate** Cast a Spell; **Frequency** once per day; **Effect** You cast 6th-rank _divine wrath_. **Activate** Cast a Spell; **Frequency** once per day; **Effect** You cast [_divine decree_](/Spells.aspx?ID=82). Judgement Thurible (Major) **Source** [Treasure Vault (Remastered)](/Sources.aspx?ID=191) pg. 126 **Price** 65,000 gp --- The additional damage from the rune granted by the thurible is 2d6, and the spell DC is 43. **Activate** Cast a Spell; **Frequency** once per day; **Effect** You cast 7th-rank _divine decree_. **Activate** Cast a Spell; **Frequency** once per day; **Effect** You cast [_summon deific herald_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1007).
name: Judgement Thurible

markdown:
**Source** [Treasure Vault (Remastered)](/Sources.aspx?ID=191) pg. 126 **Usage** affixed to armor or a weapon --- A _jyoti’s feather_ is a shimmering red-and-gold feather that seems almost metallic, although it’s delicate and flexible to the touch. Though most aren’t made from true [jyoti](/Monsters.aspx?ID=708) feathers, as the reclusive outsiders avoid visitors from [the Universe](/Planes.aspx?ID=26), the creatures’ connection to life energy lent these spellhearts their name.
  • **Armor** You gain a +2 item bonus to saving throws against [death effects](/Rules.aspx?ID=2331) and [void](/Traits.aspx?ID=510) effects.
  • **Weapon** The weapon has the [_vitalizing_](/Equipment.aspx?ID=2852) rune while the feather is affixed.
**Activate** Cast a Spell; **Effect** You cast [_stabilize_](/Spells.aspx?ID=307). Jyoti's Feather **Source** [Treasure Vault (Remastered)](/Sources.aspx?ID=191) pg. 126 **Price** 960 gp --- **Activate** Cast a Spell; **Frequency** once per day; **Effect** You cast [_vital beacon_](/Spells.aspx?ID=359). Jyoti's Feather (Greater) **Source** [Treasure Vault (Remastered)](/Sources.aspx?ID=191) pg. 126 **Price** 4,100 gp --- The item bonus when affixed to armor is +3. **Activate** Cast a Spell; **Frequency** once per day; **Effect** You cast 5th-rank _vital beacon_. **Activate** Cast a Spell; **Frequency** once per day; **Effect** You cast [_healing well_](/Spells.aspx?ID=926). Jyoti's Feather (Major) **Source** [Treasure Vault (Remastered)](/Sources.aspx?ID=191) pg. 126 **Price** 9,400 gp --- The item bonus when affixed to armor is +4, and the rune when affixed to a weapon is _greater vitalizing_. **Activate** Cast a Spell; **Frequency** once per day; **Effect** You cast 6th-rank _healing well_. **Activate** Cast a Spell; **Frequency** once per day; **Effect** You cast [_field of life_](/Spells.aspx?ID=114).
name: Jyoti's Feather

markdown:
**Source** [Treasure Vault (Remastered)](/Sources.aspx?ID=191) pg. 126 **Usage** affixed to armor or a weapon --- A _jyoti’s feather_ is a shimmering red-and-gold feather that seems almost metallic, although it’s delicate and flexible to the touch. Though most aren’t made from true [jyoti](/Monsters.aspx?ID=708) feathers, as the reclusive outsiders avoid visitors from [the Universe](/Planes.aspx?ID=26), the creatures’ connection to life energy lent these spellhearts their name.
  • **Armor** You gain a +2 item bonus to saving throws against [death effects](/Rules.aspx?ID=2331) and [void](/Traits.aspx?ID=510) effects.
  • **Weapon** The weapon has the [_vitalizing_](/Equipment.aspx?ID=2852) rune while the feather is affixed.
**Activate** Cast a Spell; **Effect** You cast [_stabilize_](/Spells.aspx?ID=307). Jyoti's Feather **Source** [Treasure Vault (Remastered)](/Sources.aspx?ID=191) pg. 126 **Price** 960 gp --- **Activate** Cast a Spell; **Frequency** once per day; **Effect** You cast [_vital beacon_](/Spells.aspx?ID=359). Jyoti's Feather (Greater) **Source** [Treasure Vault (Remastered)](/Sources.aspx?ID=191) pg. 126 **Price** 4,100 gp --- The item bonus when affixed to armor is +3. **Activate** Cast a Spell; **Frequency** once per day; **Effect** You cast 5th-rank _vital beacon_. **Activate** Cast a Spell; **Frequency** once per day; **Effect** You cast [_healing well_](/Spells.aspx?ID=926). Jyoti's Feather (Major) **Source** [Treasure Vault (Remastered)](/Sources.aspx?ID=191) pg. 126 **Price** 9,400 gp --- The item bonus when affixed to armor is +4, and the rune when affixed to a weapon is _greater vitalizing_. **Activate** Cast a Spell; **Frequency** once per day; **Effect** You cast 6th-rank _healing well_. **Activate** Cast a Spell; **Frequency** once per day; **Effect** You cast [_field of life_](/Spells.aspx?ID=114).
name: Jyoti's Feather (Major)

Lightweave Scarf (Major) **Source** [Treasure Vault (Remastered)](/Sources.aspx?ID=191) pg. 127 **Price** 22,000 gp --- Item bonus when affixed to armor is +3; when affixed to a weapon, creatures are confused for 1 minute; and the spell DC is 38. **Activate** Cast a Spell; **Frequency** once per day; **Effect** You cast 8th-rank _vibrant pattern_. **Activate** Cast a Spell; **Frequency** once per day; **Effect** You cast [_confusing colors_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1980).

markdown:
**Source** [Treasure Vault (Remastered)](/Sources.aspx?ID=191) pg. 127 _[**PFS Note**](/pathfinder-society) The standard version is permitted for use while the greater and major versions are limited._ **Usage** affixed to armor or a weapon --- This ornate doorknob can open doors both material and metaphysical, revealing dreams and nightmares. The spell DC of any spell cast by activating this item is 20.
  • **Armor** You gain a +1 item bonus to [Thievery](/Skills.aspx?ID=17) checks to [Pick a Lock](/Actions.aspx?ID=70).
  • **Weapon** If you critically succeed at a Strike with the weapon, the target is [dazzled](/Conditions.aspx?ID=7) until the end of its next turn.
**Activate** Cast a Spell; **Effect** You cast [_figment_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1528). Phantasmal Doorknob **Source** [Treasure Vault (Remastered)](/Sources.aspx?ID=191) pg. 127 **Price** 215 gp --- **Activate** Cast a Spell; **Frequency** once per day; **Effect** You cast [_phantasmal treasure_](/Spells.aspx?ID=707). Phantasmal Doorknob (Greater) **Source** [Treasure Vault (Remastered)](/Sources.aspx?ID=191) pg. 127 **Price** 900 gp --- The item bonus when affixed to armor is +2, and the spell DC is 27. On a critical hit with a weapon the doorknob is affixed to, the target is [blinded](/Conditions.aspx?ID=1) until the end of its next turn. The creature is then temporarily immune to being blinded this way for 24 hours. **Activate** Cast a Spell; **Frequency** once per day; **Effect** You cast [_vision of death_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1742). Phantasmal Doorknob (Major) **Source** [Treasure Vault (Remastered)](/Sources.aspx?ID=191) pg. 127 **Price** 6,000 gp --- The item bonus when affixed to armor is +2, and the spell DC is 34. On a critical hit with a weapon the doorknob is affixed to, the target is blinded until the end of its next turn. The creature is then temporarily immune to being blinded this way for 24 hours. **Activate** Cast a Spell; **Frequency** once per day; **Effect** You cast 6th-rank _vision of death_. **Activate** Cast a Spell; **Frequency** once per day; **Effect** You cast [_phantasmal calamity_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1630).
name: Phantasmal Doorknob

The creature is then temporarily immune to being blinded this way for 24 hours. **Activate** Cast a Spell; **Frequency** once per day; **Effect** You cast 6th-rank _vision of death_. **Activate** Cast a Spell; **Frequency** once per day; **Effect** You cast [_phantasmal calamity_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1630).
name: Phantasmal Doorknob (Major)

**Source** [Treasure Vault (Remastered)](/Sources.aspx?ID=191) pg. 127 **Usage** affixed to armor or a weapon --- This glass prism pays homage to its namesake pantheon—the [Radiant Prism](/Deities.aspx?ID=380) of [Sarenrae](/Deities.aspx?ID=292), [Desna](/Deities.aspx?ID=281), and [Shelyn](/Deities.aspx?ID=293). Any armor or weapon the prism is affixed to glows softly with colored lights. The spell DC of any spell cast by activating this item is 35.
  • **Armor** ([light](/Traits.aspx?ID=640)) After you cast a non-cantrip spell by activating the prism, you glow with [dim light](/Rules.aspx?ID=2403) in a multitude of shimmering hues, shedding light like a torch and making you [concealed](/Conditions.aspx?ID=62) until the end of your next turn.
  • **Weapon** After you cast a non-cantrip spell by activating the prism, your Strikes with the weapon gain the [_brilliant_](/Equipment.aspx?ID=2833) property rune until the end of your next turn.
**Activate** Cast a Spell; **Effect** You cast [_light_](/Spells.aspx?ID=171). Radiant Prism (Greater) **Source** [Treasure Vault (Remastered)](/Sources.aspx?ID=191) pg. 127 **Price** 20,500 gp --- The light and concealment when affixed to armor last for 2 rounds, and the spell DC is 38. The damage from the _brilliant rune_ increases to 2d4 of each type. **Activate** Cast a Spell; **Frequency** once per day; **Effect** You cast _fiery body._ **Activate** Cast a Spell; **Frequency** once per day; **Effect** You cast [_confusing colors_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1980). Radiant Prism (Major) **Source** [Treasure Vault (Remastered)](/Sources.aspx?ID=191) pg. 127 **Price** 64,000 gp --- The light and concealment when affixed to armor last for 2 rounds, and the spell DC is 43. name: Radiant Prism

markdown:
**Source** [Treasure Vault (Remastered)](/Sources.aspx?ID=191) pg. 128 **Usage** affixed to armor or a weapon --- This two-pronged fork of metal emits a constant low hum, vibrating slightly when touched. The spell attack roll of any spell cast by activating this item is +9, and the spell DC is 19.
  • **Armor** You gain resistance 2 to sonic damage and a +1 item bonus to saving throws against effects with the [auditory](/Traits.aspx?ID=16) or [sonic](/Traits.aspx?ID=147) trait.
  • **Weapon** After you cast a sonic spell by activating the fork, the weapon reverberates with trapped sound waves. Your next Strike causes the target to be [deafened](/Conditions.aspx?ID=8) for 1 round if it hits (or for 3 rounds on a critical hit). If you don't make a Strike by the end of your next turn, the sound waves dissipate with no effect.
**Activate** Cast a Spell; **Effect** You cast [_bullhorn_](/Spells.aspx?ID=877). Resonating Fork **Source** [Treasure Vault (Remastered)](/Sources.aspx?ID=191) pg. 128 **Price** 140 gp --- **Activate** Cast a Spell; **Frequency** once per day; **Effect** You cast [_biting words_](/Spells.aspx?ID=868). Resonating Fork (Greater) **Source** [Treasure Vault (Remastered)](/Sources.aspx?ID=191) pg. 128 **Price** 340 gp --- The resistance is 5 and the item bonus is +2 when affixed to armor, the deafened duration when affixed to a weapon is 3 rounds (1 minute on a critical success), the spell attack roll is +13, and the spell DC is 23. **Activate** Cast a Spell; **Frequency** once per day; **Effect** You cast 2nd-rank _biting words_. **Activate** Cast a Spell; **Frequency** once per day; **Effect** You cast [_noise blast_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1616). Resonating Fork (Major) **Source** [Treasure Vault (Remastered)](/Sources.aspx?ID=191) pg. 128 **Price** 1,800 gp --- The resistance is 10 and the item bonus is +2 when affixed to armor, the deafened duration when affixed to a weapon is 1 minute (1 hour on a critical success), and the spell DC is 29. **Activate** Cast a Spell; **Frequency** once per day; **Effect** You cast 4th-rank _noise blast_. **Activate** Cast a Spell; **Frequency** once per day; **Effect** You cast [_painful vibrations_](/Spells.aspx?ID=964).
name: Resonating Fork

markdown:
**Source** [Treasure Vault (Remastered)](/Sources.aspx?ID=191) pg. 128 **Usage** affixed to armor or a weapon --- Slowly spinning at the center of this crystalline orb is a single snowflake, and its surface remains lightly covered in frost no matter how hot the weather is outside. The spell attack roll of any spell cast by activating this item is +7, and the spell DC is 17.
  • **Armor** You gain resistance 2 to cold.
  • **Weapon** After you cast a [cold](/Traits.aspx?ID=27) spell by activating the crystal, your Strikes with the weapon deal an additional 1d4 cold damage until the end of your next turn.
**Activate** Cast a Spell; **Effect** You cast [_frostbite_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1539). Rime Crystal **Source** [Treasure Vault (Remastered)](/Sources.aspx?ID=191) pg. 128 **Price** 55 gp Rime Crystal (Greater) **Source** [Treasure Vault (Remastered)](/Sources.aspx?ID=191) pg. 128 **Price** 425 gp --- Resistance when affixed to armor is 5, extra damage when affixed to a weapon is 1d6, the spell attack modifier is +14, and the spell DC is 24. **Activate** Cast a Spell; **Frequency** once per day; **Effect** You cast 3rd-rank [_chilling spray_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1975). Rime Crystal (Major) **Source** [Treasure Vault (Remastered)](/Sources.aspx?ID=191) pg. 128 **Price** 2,800 gp --- Resistance when affixed to armor is 10, extra damage when affixed to a weapon is 1d8, the spell attack modifier is +20, and the spell DC is 30. **Activate** Cast a Spell; **Frequency** once per day; **Effect** You cast [_ice storm_](/Spells.aspx?ID=2001). **Activate** Cast a Spell; **Frequency** once per day; **Effect** You cast [_howling blizzard_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1559).
name: Rime Crystal

markdown:
**Source** [Treasure Vault (Remastered)](/Sources.aspx?ID=191) pg. 128 **Usage** affixed to armor or a weapon --- A pointed [vampire](/MonsterFamilies.aspx?ID=480) fang hovers within this smoked-glass vial, its tip crimson with slowly dripping blood. The spell DC of any spell cast by activating this item is 25.
  • **Armor** You gain [resistance](/Rules.aspx?ID=2312) 3 to [persistent bleed damage](/Conditions.aspx?ID=86) and a +2 item bonus on saving throws against effects with the [void](/Traits.aspx?ID=510) trait.
  • **Weapon** After you cast a spell by activating the fang, your Strikes with the weapon deal 1d4 persistent bleed damage until the end of your next turn.
**Activate** Cast a Spell; **Effect** You cast [_void warp_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1745). Sanguine Fang **Source** [Treasure Vault (Remastered)](/Sources.aspx?ID=191) pg. 128 **Price** 650 gp --- **Activate** Cast a Spell; **Frequency** once per day; **Effect** You cast [_vampiric feast_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1736). Sanguine Fang (Greater) **Source** [Treasure Vault (Remastered)](/Sources.aspx?ID=191) pg. 128 **Price** 1,750 gp --- The resistance is 5 when affixed to armor, the persistent bleed damage is 1d6 when affixed to a weapon, and the spell DC is 29. **Activate** Cast a Spell; **Frequency** once per day; **Effect** You cast [_sanguine mist_](/Spells.aspx?ID=989). **Activate** Cast a Spell; **Frequency** once per day; **Effect** You cast 4th-rank _vampiric feast_. Sanguine Fang (Major) **Source** [Treasure Vault (Remastered)](/Sources.aspx?ID=191) pg. 128 **Price** 5,750 gp --- The resistance is 10 and the item bonus is +3 when affixed to armor, the persistent bleed damage is 2d6 when affixed to a weapon, and the spell DC is 34. **Activate** Cast a Spell; **Frequency** once per day; **Effect** You cast 5th-rank _vampiric feast_. **Activate** Cast a Spell; **Frequency** once per day; **Effect** You cast [_vampiric exsanguination_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1735).
name: Sanguine Fang

markdown:
**Source** [Treasure Vault (Remastered)](/Sources.aspx?ID=191) pg. 128 **Usage** affixed to armor or a weapon --- This jagged, bony growth narrows to a sharp, pointed tip. Deep groves from some former battle scar its surface. The bearer of a _saurian spike_ often feels a sudden surge in power and confidence. The spell attack modifier of any spell cast by activating this item is +15.
  • **Armor** You gain [imprecise](/Rules.aspx?ID=2407) [scent](/MonsterAbilities.aspx?ID=74) with a range of 30 feet.
  • **Weapon** ([auditory](/Traits.aspx?ID=541), [emotion](/Traits.aspx?ID=590), [fear](/Traits.aspx?ID=598), [visual](/Traits.aspx?ID=727)) When you cast a [polymorph](/Traits.aspx?ID=670) spell by activating the spike, your battle form is exceptionally fearsome. Each enemy in a 30-foot [emanation](/Rules.aspx?ID=2387) must succeed at a DC 27 Will saving throw or become [frightened](/Conditions.aspx?ID=76) 1 (frightened 2 on a critical failure).
**Activate** Cast a Spell; **Effect** You cast [_gouging claw_](/Spells.aspx?ID=920). Saurian Spike **Source** [Treasure Vault (Remastered)](/Sources.aspx?ID=191) pg. 128 **Price** 700 gp --- **Activate** Cast a Spell; **Frequency** once per day; **Effect** You cast [_dinosaur form_](/Spells.aspx?ID=72). Saurian Spike (Greater) **Source** [Treasure Vault (Remastered)](/Sources.aspx?ID=191) pg. 128 **Price** 1,400 gp --- The range of the scent and fear emanation are both 60 feet, and their save DC is 28. The spell attack modifier is +18. **Activate** Cast a Spell; **Frequency** once per day; **Effect** You cast 5th-rank _dinosaur form_. Saurian Spike (Major) **Source** [Treasure Vault (Remastered)](/Sources.aspx?ID=191) pg. 128 **Price** 6,500 gp --- The range of the scent and fear emanation are both 60 feet. The scent is [precise](/Rules.aspx?ID=2406) instead of imprecise, and creatures that fail their saves are frightened 2 (frightened 3 on a critical failure) with a DC 34 save. The spell attack modifier is +24. **Activate** Cast a Spell; **Frequency** once per day; **Effect** You cast 7th-rank _dinosaur form_.
name: Saurian Spike

markdown:
**Source** [Treasure Vault (Remastered)](/Sources.aspx?ID=191) pg. 129 **Usage** affixed to armor or a weapon --- Carved in this wooden disc is a humanoid eye, painted in muted shades that blend in with the wood. The eye’s pupil continually twitches and moves, scanning its bearer’s surroundings.
  • **Armor** ([revelation](/Traits.aspx?ID=686)) You aren’t [off-guard](/Conditions.aspx?ID=58) to [hidden](/Conditions.aspx?ID=79) or [undetected](/Conditions.aspx?ID=96) creatures of the eye’s level or lower, or creatures of the eye’s level or lower using surprise attack, though you can still be [flanked](/Rules.aspx?ID=2375).
  • **Weapon** When you make a [Strike](/Actions.aspx?ID=2306) with the weapon against a target that’s [concealed](/Conditions.aspx?ID=62), hidden, or undetected, the DC of your flat check to target it is 4 if the target is concealed or 10 if it’s hidden or undetected.
**Activate** Cast a Spell; **Effect** You cast [_detect magic_](/Spells.aspx?ID=66). Vigilant Eye **Source** [Treasure Vault (Remastered)](/Sources.aspx?ID=191) pg. 129 **Price** 650 gp --- **Activate** Cast a Spell; **Frequency** once per day; **Effect** You cast [_web of eyes_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1032). Vigilant Eye (Greater) **Source** [Treasure Vault (Remastered)](/Sources.aspx?ID=191) pg. 129 **Price** 1,250 gp --- The flat check DC if the eye is affixed to a weapon is 3 if the target is concealed or 9 if it's hidden. **Activate** Cast a Spell; **Frequency** once per day; **Effect** You cast [_clairvoyance_](/Spells.aspx?ID=40). Vigilant Eye (Major) **Source** [Treasure Vault (Remastered)](/Sources.aspx?ID=191) pg. 129 **Price** 2,700 gp --- The flat check DC if the eye is affixed to a weapon is 2 if the target is concealed or 8 if it's hidden. **Activate** Cast a Spell; **Frequency** once per day; **Effect** You cast _clairvoyance_. **Activate** Cast a Spell; **Frequency** once per day; **Effect** You cast [_scouting eye_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1661).
name: Vigilant Eye

markdown:
**Source** [Treasure Vault (Remastered)](/Sources.aspx?ID=191) pg. 129 **Usage** affixed to armor or a weapon --- This small figurine is carved from soapstone in the shape of a deity or guardian, facing both front and back to indicate unflagging vigilance. The spell attack roll of any spell cast by activating this item is +13.
  • **Armor** You gain resistance 1 against ranged weapon attacks.
  • **Weapon** When you hit with a Strike using the affixed weapon, or when a spell effect you created by activating the statuette hits with a Strike, you can choose a creature adjacent to the creature that was hit. That creature gains a +1 status bonus to AC until the start of your next turn. No more than one creature can benefit from this each turn.
**Activate** Cast a Spell; **Effect** You cast [_shield_](/Spells.aspx?ID=280). Warding Statuette **Source** [Treasure Vault (Remastered)](/Sources.aspx?ID=191) pg. 129 **Price** 325 gp --- **Activate** Cast a Spell; **Frequency** once per day; **Effect** You cast [_spiritual armament_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1687). Warding Statuette (Greater) **Source** [Treasure Vault (Remastered)](/Sources.aspx?ID=191) pg. 129 **Price** 2,600 gp --- The resistance is 5 when affixed to armor, and the spell attack roll is +20. **Activate** Cast a Spell; **Frequency** once per day; **Effect** You cast 5th-rank _spiritual armament_. **Activate** Cast a Spell; **Frequency** once per day; **Effect** You cast [_spiritual guardian_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1688).
name: Warding Statuette

markdown:
**Source** [Treasure Vault (Remastered)](/Sources.aspx?ID=191) pg. 129 **Usage** affixed to armor or a weapon --- The broken tips of four [dragon](/MonsterFamilies.aspx?ID=395) claws—one of each magical tradition—are set into a silver fitting. They protrude in the shape of a star or compass.
  • **Armor** After you cast a non-cantrip spell by activating the spindle, you gain [resistance](/Rules.aspx?ID=2318) 5 to [fire](/Traits.aspx?ID=604), [force](/Traits.aspx?ID=610), [mental](/Traits.aspx?ID=647), and [spirit](/Traits.aspx?ID=737) for 1 minute.
  • **Weapon** After you cast a non-cantrip spell by activating the spindle, you gain a Dragon Breath activity that takes 2 actions and deals 6d6 damage to all creatures in a 30-foot [cone](/Rules.aspx?ID=2386) with a DC 28 basic Reflex save. **Activate** Cast a Spell; **Effect** You cast [_gouging claw_](/Spells.aspx?ID=920). markdown:
**Source** [Treasure Vault (Remastered)](/Sources.aspx?ID=191) pg. 130 **Usage** held in 1 hand **Bulk** 1 --- Iron strips line the body of an _accursed staff_, capping the bottom and folding into an intricate knot at the top. While wielding an _accursed staff_, you're empowered by the curses you inflict. If an enemy fails a saving throw against a spell you cast that has the [curse](/Traits.aspx?ID=38) trait, you gain temporary Hit Points equal to double that spell's level. These temporary Hit Points last 10 minutes. The enemy must be a significant threat and can't have been a willing subject of the curse. **Activate** Cast a Spell; **Effect** You expend a number of charges from the staff to cast a spell from its list. **Craft Requirements** Supply one casting of all listed levels of all listed spells. Accursed Staff **Source** [Treasure Vault (Remastered)](/Sources.aspx?ID=191) pg. 130 **Price** 250 gp **Bulk** 1 ---
  • **Cantrip** [_daze_](/Spells.aspx?ID=61)
  • **1st** [_bane_](/Spells.aspx?ID=18), [_ill omen_](/Spells.aspx?ID=696)
  • **2nd** [_blood vendetta_](/Spells.aspx?ID=675), [_warrior's regret_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1030)
Accursed Staff (Greater) **Source** [Treasure Vault (Remastered)](/Sources.aspx?ID=191) pg. 130 **Price** 900 gp **Bulk** 1 ---
  • **3rd** [_ claim curse_](/Spells.aspx?ID=884), [_cup of dust_](/Spells.aspx?ID=572)
  • **4th** [_cleanse affliction_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1467), [_outcast’s curse_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1620), _warrior’s regret_
Accursed Staff (Major) **Source** [Treasure Vault (Remastered)](/Sources.aspx?ID=191) pg. 130 **Price** 4,000 gp **Bulk** 1 ---
  • **5th** [_inevitable disaster_](/Spells.aspx?ID=930), [_mariner’s curse_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1593)
  • **6th** [_blinding fury_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1968), _cleanse affliction_, [_never mind_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1614)
name: Accursed Staff

markdown:
**Source** [Treasure Vault (Remastered)](/Sources.aspx?ID=191) pg. 130 **Usage** held in 1 hand **Bulk** 1 --- The visages of beasts are carved into the painted wood of a _beast staff_, with a large head on top. The staff is a _[+1 striking ](/Equipment.aspx?ID=2861) [staff](/Weapons.aspx?ID=367)_. While wielding the staff while you have it prepared, you’re affected by [_speak with animals_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1680). If you have [Animal Empathy](/Feats.aspx?ID=4709), you gain a +1 circumstance bonus on checks using it. **Activate** Cast a Spell; **Effect** You expend a number of charges from the staff to cast a spell from its list. **Craft Requirements** Supply one casting of all listed levels of all listed spells. Beast Staff **Source** [Treasure Vault (Remastered)](/Sources.aspx?ID=191) pg. 130 **Price** 340 gp **Bulk** 1 ---
  • **Cantrip** [_ gouging claw_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1546)
  • **1st** [_ pest form_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1626), [_runic body_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1657)
  • **2nd** [_ animal form_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1440), [_enlarge_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1514)
Beast Staff (Greater) **Source** [Treasure Vault (Remastered)](/Sources.aspx?ID=191) pg. 130 **Price** 1,400 gp **Bulk** 1 --- The staff is a _+2 striking staff_. The circumstance bonus if you have Animal Empathy is +2.
  • **3rd** _animal form_, [_insect form_](/Spells.aspx?ID=163)
  • **4th** _animal form_, [_bestial curse_](/Spells.aspx?ID=670), _insect form_, _pest form_
Beast Staff (Major) **Source** [Treasure Vault (Remastered)](/Sources.aspx?ID=191) pg. 130 **Price** 6,250 gp **Bulk** 1 --- The staff is a _+2 greater striking staff_. The circumstance bonus if you have Animal Empathy is +2.
  • 5th _animal form_, insect form, [_moon frenzy_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1609)
  • **6th** [_cursed metamorphosis_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1479), _moon frenzy_
name: Beast Staff

**Source** [Treasure Vault (Remastered)](/Sources.aspx?ID=191) pg. 131 **Usage** held in 1 hand **Bulk** 1 --- A _boreal staff_ is chiseled from a cylinder of ice to form a spiky, jagged icicle, its surface gleaming with the colors of the northern lights. It gives the air around you a distinct chill. When used as a weapon, a _boreal staff_ is a _+1 [striking](/Equipment.aspx?ID=280) [staff](/Weapons.aspx?ID=12)_. **Activate** ([concentrate](/Traits.aspx?ID=561)) **Frequency** once per 10 minutes; **Effect** Attempt a Strike using the staff. That Strike deals 2d4 additional cold damage. **Activate** Cast a Spell; **Effect** You expend a number of charges from the staff to cast a spell from its list. **Craft Requirements** Supply one casting of all listed levels of all listed spells. Boreal Staff **Source** [Treasure Vault (Remastered)](/Sources.aspx?ID=191) pg. 131 **Price** 500 gp **Bulk** 1 ---
  • **Cantrip** [_frostbite_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1539)
  • **1st** [_ chilling spray_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1975), [_gust of wind_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1550)
  • **2nd** _ chilling spray_
  • **3rd** _chilling spray_, [_elemental absorption _](/Spells.aspx?ID=901)(water only)
Boreal Staff (Greater) **Source** [Treasure Vault (Remastered)](/Sources.aspx?ID=191) pg. 131 **Price** 2,750 gp **Bulk** 1 --- This is a _+2 striking frost staff_.
  • **4th** _ chilling spray_, [_ice storm_](/Spells.aspx?ID=2001)
  • **5th** [_howling blizzard_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1559), [_mantle of the frozen heart_](/Spells.aspx?ID=946)
Boreal Staff (Major) **Source** [Treasure Vault (Remastered)](/Sources.aspx?ID=191) pg. 131 **Price** 13,500 gp **Bulk** 1 --- This is a _+3 greater striking [frost](/Equipment.aspx?ID=2839) staff_. The additional cold damage from the activation ignores cold resistance.
  • **6th** _howling blizzard_
  • **7th** [_ frigid flurry_](/Spells.aspx?ID=916), _howling blizzard_
name: Boreal Staff

markdown:
**Source** [Treasure Vault (Remastered)](/Sources.aspx?ID=191) pg. 131 **Price** 14,000 gp **Usage** held in 1 hand **Bulk** 1 --- Heavenly radiance shines from an active _celestial staff_, a golden staff capped with a pair of sculpted angel’s wings. Used as a weapon, the staff is a _[+2 greater striking ](/Equipment.aspx?ID=2861) [holy ](/Equipment.aspx?ID=2842) [staff](/Weapons.aspx?ID=367)_. While wielding a _celestial staff_, you gain a +1 circumstance bonus to saving throws against effects that have the [unholy](/Traits.aspx?ID=521) trait and effects created by unholy creatures. When you prepare this staff, if you’re unholy, you become [drained](/Conditions.aspx?ID=68) 1 until your next daily preparations. **Activate** [Cast a Spell](/Actions.aspx?ID=2734); **Effect** You expend a number of charges from the staff to cast a spell from its list.
  • **Cantrip** [_divine lance_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1498)
  • **1st** [_bless_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1451), [_protection_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1641)
  • **2nd** [_everlight_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1518), [_inner radiance torrent_](/Spells.aspx?ID=934)
  • **3rd** [_anointed ground_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1965), _protection_
  • **4th** [_holy cascade_](/Spells.aspx?ID=2000), _inner radiance torrent_
  • **5th** [_spiritual guardian_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1688), [_summon celestial_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1695)
  • **6th** _holy cascade_, _summon celestial_
  • **7th** [_ frigid flurry_](/Spells.aspx?ID=916), [_howling blizzard_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1559)
**Craft Requirements** You’re holy. Supply one casting of all listed ranks of all listed spells.
name: Celestial Staff

  • **2nd** [_loose time's arrow_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1185), _synchronize_
  • **3rd** [_day's weight_](/Spells.aspx?ID=891), [_haste_](/Spells.aspx?ID=147), [_slow_](/Spells.aspx?ID=289), [_time jump_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1019)
  • **4th** [_curse of lost time_](/Spells.aspx?ID=683)
  • **5th** [_quicken time_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1187), [_rewinding step_](/Spells.aspx?ID=985), [_stagnate time_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1188)
  • **6th** [_cast into time_](/Spells.aspx?ID=880), _day's weight_
  • **7th** [_time beacon_](/Spells.aspx?ID=592)
**Craft Requirements** Supply one casting of all listed levels of all listed spells.

markdown:
**Source** [Treasure Vault (Remastered)](/Sources.aspx?ID=191) pg. 131 **Usage** held in 1 hand **Bulk** 1 --- A _composer staff_ is short and shaped like an elegant black conductor's baton with a silver tip. When waved through the air, it hums melodically. In this way, you can play it as though it were an instrument, and it grants a +1 item bonus to [Performance](/Skills.aspx?ID=12) checks made with it. **Activate** Cast a Spell; **Effect** You expend a number of charges from the staff to cast a spell from its list. **Craft Requirements** Supply one casting of all listed levels of all listed spells. Composer Staff **Source** [Treasure Vault (Remastered)](/Sources.aspx?ID=191) pg. 131 **Price** 80 gp **Bulk** 1 ---
  • **Cantrip** [_haunting hymn_](/Spells.aspx?ID=924), [_summon instrument_](/Spells.aspx?ID=721)
  • **1st** [_concordant choir_](/Spells.aspx?ID=886)
Composer Staff (Greater) **Source** [Treasure Vault (Remastered)](/Sources.aspx?ID=191) pg. 131 **Price** 480 gp **Bulk** 1 ---
  • **2nd** [_sonata span_](/Spells.aspx?ID=998)
  • **3rd** [_concordant choir_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1979), [_enthrall_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1516), [_roaring applause_](/Spells.aspx?ID=987)
Composer Staff (Major) **Source** [Treasure Vault (Remastered)](/Sources.aspx?ID=191) pg. 131 **Price** 1,800 gp **Bulk** 1 --- The item bonus is +2.
  • **4th** [_ infectious melody_](/Spells.aspx?ID=933)
  • **5th** [_concordant choir_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1979), [_truespeech_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1728)

**Source** [Treasure Vault (Remastered)](/Sources.aspx?ID=191) pg. 132 **Usage** held in 1 hand **Bulk** 1 --- A multi-hued array of scales covers a _dragonprism staff_, forming a gradient of color, and a dragon's claw holds a gem upon the staff's head. [Dragons](/Traits.aspx?ID=50) give allies these staves as a mark of esteem. While wielding a _dragonprism staff_ you seem fiercer, gaining a +1 circumstance bonus to [Intimidation](/Skills.aspx?ID=7) checks to [Demoralize](/Actions.aspx?ID=53). **Activate** Cast a Spell; **Effect** You expend a number of charges from the staff to cast a spell from its list. **Craft Requirements** Supply one casting of all listed levels of all listed spells. Dragonprism Staff **Source** [Treasure Vault (Remastered)](/Sources.aspx?ID=191) pg. 132 **Price** 4,500 gp **Bulk** 1 ---
  • **Cantrip** [_gouging claw_](/Spells.aspx?ID=920), [_puff of poison_](/Spells.aspx?ID=977)
  • **1st** [_burning hands_](/Spells.aspx?ID=30), [_fear_](/Spells.aspx?ID=110)
  • **2nd** [_acid arrow_](/Spells.aspx?ID=2), [_resist energy_](/Spells.aspx?ID=256)
  • **3rd** _fear_, [_lightning bolt_](/Spells.aspx?ID=172)
  • **4th** [_fly_](/Spells.aspx?ID=125), [_reflective scales_](/Spells.aspx?ID=583)
  • **5th** [_howling blizzard_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1559), [_summon dragon_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1697)
  • **6th** [_dragon form_](/Spells.aspx?ID=88), _reflective scales_, _summon dragon_
Dragonprism Staff (Greater) **Source** [Treasure Vault (Remastered)](/Sources.aspx?ID=191) pg. 132 **Price** 68,000 gp **Bulk** 1 ---
  • **7th** _summon dragon_
  • **8th** _dragon form_, _summon dragon_
  • **9th** [_summon draconic legion_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1008), _summon dragon_
name: Dragonprism Staff

markdown:
**Source** [Treasure Vault (Remastered)](/Sources.aspx?ID=191) pg. 132 **Price** 2,000 gp **Usage** held in 1 hand **Bulk** 1 --- A small glass orb on the head of a _gambler's staff_ holds a pair of six-sided dice that shift and roll within. Spellcasters who make their living via games of chance use _gamblers' staves_ to encourage the odds in their favor. Most gambling dens ban players they discover using such magic items. A _gambler's staff_ grants you a +2 circumstance bonus to checks to [Earn Income](/Actions.aspx?ID=23) from gambling (typically using [Games Lore](/Skills.aspx?ID=8)). To get this benefit, the staff must be on your person during all the downtime you spend gambling. **Activate** Cast a Spell; **Effect** You expend a number of charges from the staff to cast a spell from its list.
  • **Cantrip** [_wash your luck_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1031)
  • **1st** [_nudge the odds_](/Spells.aspx?ID=957)
  • **2nd** [_lucky number_](/Spells.aspx?ID=941)
  • **3rd** [_shift blame_](/Spells.aspx?ID=997)
  • **4th** [_read omens_](/Spells.aspx?ID=247), [_winning streak_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1034)
  • **5th** _nudge the odds_
**Craft Requirements** Supply one casting of all listed levels of all listed spells.
name: Gambler's Staff

markdown:
**Source** [Treasure Vault (Remastered)](/Sources.aspx?ID=191) pg. 132 **Usage** held in 1 hand **Bulk** 1 --- A _guardian staff_ is formed from ivory strands woven in a diamond pattern and capped with a glowing ruby. Those charged with protecting others value this staff's spells. **Activate** ([concentrate](/Traits.aspx?ID=561)) **Effect** You raise the staff and choose an ally within 10 feet. A ruby-colored plane of force appears like a shield near the ally, granting them a +1 circumstance bonus to AC until the start of your next turn. If you use this action again, any creature you previously granted this bonus to loses it. **Activate** Cast a Spell; **Effect** You expend a number of charges from the staff to cast a spell from its list. **Craft Requirements** Supply one casting of all listed levels of all listed spells. Guardian Staff **Source** [Treasure Vault (Remastered)](/Sources.aspx?ID=191) pg. 132 **Price** 250 gp **Bulk** 1 ---
  • **Cantrip** [_forbidding ward_](/Spells.aspx?ID=126)
  • **1st** [_sanctuary_](/Spells.aspx?ID=266), [_spirit link_](/Spells.aspx?ID=302)
  • **2nd** [_share life_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1669), _spirit link_
Guardian Staff (Greater) **Source** [Treasure Vault (Remastered)](/Sources.aspx?ID=191) pg. 132 **Price** 900 gp **Bulk** 1 ---
  • **3rd** [_life connection_](/Spells.aspx?ID=939), _spirit link_
  • **4th** _spirit link_, [_unfettered movement_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1732)
Guardian Staff (Major) **Source** [Treasure Vault (Remastered)](/Sources.aspx?ID=191) pg. 132 **Price** 4,000 gp **Bulk** 1 ---
  • **5th** [_blessing of defiance_](/Spells.aspx?ID=871), _spirit link_, [_spiritual guardian_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1688)
  • **6th** [_repulsion_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1650), [_scintillating safeguard_](/Spells.aspx?ID=2023), _spirit link_, _unfettered movement_
name: Guardian Staff

markdown:
**Source** [Treasure Vault (Remastered)](/Sources.aspx?ID=191) pg. 132 **Usage** held in 1 hand **Bulk** 1 --- A _guardian staff_ is formed from ivory strands woven in a diamond pattern and capped with a glowing ruby. Those charged with protecting others value this staff's spells. **Activate** ([concentrate](/Traits.aspx?ID=561)) **Effect** You raise the staff and choose an ally within 10 feet. A ruby-colored plane of force appears like a shield near the ally, granting them a +1 circumstance bonus to AC until the start of your next turn. If you use this action again, any creature you previously granted this bonus to loses it. **Activate** Cast a Spell; **Effect** You expend a number of charges from the staff to cast a spell from its list. **Craft Requirements** Supply one casting of all listed levels of all listed spells. Guardian Staff **Source** [Treasure Vault (Remastered)](/Sources.aspx?ID=191) pg. 132 **Price** 250 gp **Bulk** 1 ---

  • **1st** [_sanctuary_](/Spells.aspx?ID=266), [_spirit link_](/Spells.aspx?ID=302)
  • **2nd** [_share life_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1669), _spirit link_
Guardian Staff (Greater) **Source** [Treasure Vault (Remastered)](/Sources.aspx?ID=191) pg. 132 **Price** 900 gp **Bulk** 1 ---
  • **3rd** [_life connection_](/Spells.aspx?ID=939), _spirit link_

Guardian Staff (Major) **Source** [Treasure Vault (Remastered)](/Sources.aspx?ID=191) pg. 132 **Price** 4,000 gp **Bulk** 1 ---
  • **5th** [_blessing of defiance_](/Spells.aspx?ID=871), _spirit link_, [_spiritual guardian_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1688)
  • **6th** [_repulsion_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1650), [_scintillating safeguard_](/Spells.aspx?ID=2023), _spirit link_, _unfettered movement_

markdown:
**Source** [Treasure Vault (Remastered)](/Sources.aspx?ID=191) pg. 132 **Price** 13,000 gp **Usage** held in 1 hand **Bulk** 1 --- A _hell staff_ is a tall, pointed staff forged of red-tinted steel with [Diabolic](/Languages.aspx?ID=117) inscriptions that march neatly down its sides. At its top sits an inverted ruby pyramid divided into nine sections. Found mostly in Cheliax or other lands where diabolic influences hold sway, when used as a weapon the staff is a _[+3 greater striking ](/Equipment.aspx?ID=2861) [flaming ](/Equipment.aspx?ID=2838) [unholy ](/Equipment.aspx?ID=2851) [staff](/Weapons.aspx?ID=367)_. When you prepare this staff, if you’re [holy](/Traits.aspx?ID=517), you become [drained](/Conditions.aspx?ID=68) 1 until your next daily preparations. The staff’s [_summon lesser servitor_](/Spells.aspx?ID=2034) spell can be used only to summon animals with the [fiend](/Traits.aspx?ID=600) trait, [devils](/MonsterFamilies.aspx?ID=389), or [hell hounds](/MonsterFamilies.aspx?ID=427) (at 4th rank). Its [_summon fiend_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1701) spell can summon only devils or hell hounds. **Activate** Cast a Spell; **Effect** You expend a number of charges from the staff to cast a spell from its list.
  • **Cantrip** [_divine lance_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1498)
  • **1st** [_protection_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1641), _summon lesser servitor_
  • **2nd** [darkvision](/Familiars.aspx?ID=142), _summon lesser servitor_
  • **3rd** [_chilling darkness_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1464), _darkvision_, _summon lesser servitor_
  • **4th** [_divine wrath_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1499), _summon lesser servitor_
  • **5th** _darkvision_, [_divine immolation_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1496), _summon fiend_
  • **6th** [_devil form_](/Spells.aspx?ID=894), _summon fiend_
  • **7th** [_divine decree_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1495), _summon fiend_
**Craft Requirements** You’re unholy. Supply one casting of all listed ranks of all listed spells.
name: Hell Staff

**Source** [Treasure Vault (Remastered)](/Sources.aspx?ID=191) pg. 133 **Usage** held in 1 hand **Bulk** 1 --- A _librarian staff_ is a slender pole composed of thousands of coiled and compressed book pages swirling into one another, with a mishmash of letters tumbling across its surface. The sound of rustling pages can be heard when the staff moves. **Activate** ([concentrate](/Traits.aspx?ID=561), [manipulate](/Traits.aspx?ID=645)) **Effect** You store one portable text of 1 Bulk or less—typically a book or scroll—in an extradimensional space in the staff. You can also use this activation to retrieve one text stored in the staff. The staff can store up to 50 texts. **Activate** Cast a Spell; **Effect** You expend a number of charges from the staff to cast a spell from its list. **Craft Requirements** Supply one casting of all listed levels of all listed spells. Librarian Staff **Source** [Treasure Vault (Remastered)](/Sources.aspx?ID=191) pg. 133 **Price** 225 gp **Bulk** 1 ---
  • **Cantrip** [_approximate_](/Spells.aspx?ID=864), [_read aura_](/Spells.aspx?ID=246)
  • **1st** [_pocket library_](/Spells.aspx?ID=970), [_quick sort_](/Spells.aspx?ID=978), [_share lore_](/Spells.aspx?ID=584)
  • **2nd** [_timely tutor_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1020), [_translate_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1723)
Librarian Staff (Greater) **Source** [Treasure Vault (Remastered)](/Sources.aspx?ID=191) pg. 133 **Price** 1,750 gp **Bulk** 1 --- The staff can store up to 100 texts.
  • **3rd** [_pocket library_](/Spells.aspx?ID=970), _quick sort_, _share lore_, _translate_
  • **4th** _translate_
  • **5th** _quick sort_, _share lore_
name: Librarian Staff

**Source** [Treasure Vault (Remastered)](/Sources.aspx?ID=191) pg. 133 **Usage** held in 1 hand **Bulk** 1 --- A crystalline sphere, swirling with constantly shifting constellations, sits atop a _lyrakien staff_, a silver shaft that sparkles with the gentle glow of starlight. [Desnans](/Deities.aspx?ID=5) first created the staves, inspired by the music- and freedom-loving [lyrakien azatas](/Monsters.aspx?ID=34), but these staves are popular with spellcasters of all faiths who like travel, art, or the stars. While wielding a _lyrakien staff_, you gain a +1 circumstance bonus on saving throws against [incapacitation](/Traits.aspx?ID=93) effects. **Activate** Cast a Spell; **Effect** You expend a number of charges from the staff to cast a spell from its list. **Craft Requirements** Supply one casting of all listed levels of all listed spells. Lyrakien Staff **Source** [Treasure Vault (Remastered)](/Sources.aspx?ID=191) pg. 133 **Price** 225 gp **Bulk** 1 ---
  • **Cantrip** [_guidance_](/Spells.aspx?ID=142), [_summon instrument_](/Spells.aspx?ID=721)
  • **1st** [_concordant choir_](/Spells.aspx?ID=886)
  • **2nd** [_guiding star_](/Spells.aspx?ID=923), [_sure footing_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1708)
Lyrakien Staff (Greater) **Source** [Treasure Vault (Remastered)](/Sources.aspx?ID=191) pg. 133 **Price** 920 gp **Bulk** 1 --- The circumstance bonus is +2.
  • **3rd** [_dream message_](/Spells.aspx?ID=90), [_safe passage_](/Spells.aspx?ID=712), [_wanderer's guide_](/Spells.aspx?ID=368)
  • **4th** _concordant choir_, [_dream message_](/Spells.aspx?ID=90), _sure footing_, [_unfettered movement_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1732)
Lyrakien Staff (Major) **Source** [Treasure Vault (Remastered)](/Sources.aspx?ID=191) pg. 133 **Price** 8,600 gp **Bulk** 1 --- The circumstance bonus is +2.
  • **5th** [_safe passage_](/Spells.aspx?ID=712), [_summon celestial_](/Spells.aspx?ID=317) ([azata](/MonsterFamilies.aspx?ID=10) only)
  • **6th** _concordant choir_, [_zealous conviction_](/Spells.aspx?ID=378)
  • **7th** [_cosmic form_](/Spells.aspx?ID=889), _sure footing_
name: Lyrakien Staff

markdown:
**Source** [Treasure Vault (Remastered)](/Sources.aspx?ID=191) pg. 133 **Price** 2,000 gp **Usage** held in 1 hand **Bulk** 1 --- Carved of driftwood stained white with the salt of the sea, a _pirate staff_ has jewels and gold pieces embedded in the wood. A skull and crossbones sit on top. When used as a weapon, the staff is a _+2 [striking](/Equipment.aspx?ID=280) [fearsome](/Equipment.aspx?ID=731) [staff](/Weapons.aspx?ID=12)_. While wielding the staff, you gain a +2 circumstance bonus to [Intimidation](/Skills.aspx?ID=7) checks to [Coerce](/Actions.aspx?ID=52). **Activate** Cast a Spell; **Effect** You expend a number of charges from the staff to cast a spell from its list.
  • **Cantrip** [_gale blast_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1994), [_know the way_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1582)
  • **1st** [_seashell of stolen sound_](/Spells.aspx?ID=993)
  • **2nd** [_mist_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1606), [_water breathing_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1755), [_water walk_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1756)
  • **3rd** [_mind of menace_](/Spells.aspx?ID=949), _water breathing_
  • **4th** [_coral eruption_](/Spells.aspx?ID=887), _water breathing_, _water walk_
  • **5th** [_flowing strike_](/Spells.aspx?ID=914), [_mariner’s curse_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1593)
**Craft Requirements** Supply one casting of all listed levels of all listed spells.
name: Pirate Staff

markdown:
**Source** [Treasure Vault (Remastered)](/Sources.aspx?ID=191) pg. 134 **Price** 1,900 gp **Usage** held in 1 hand **Bulk** 1 --- A _socialite staff_ is designed as an ornate cane, its metal body glimmering with jewels and gold inlays. A sculpture carved from obsidian tops the head of the staff, its design depending on its wielder's taste. Common choices include birds, flowers, or family crests. While wielding a _socialite staff_, you gain a +2 circumstance bonus to [Make an Impression](/Actions.aspx?ID=50) on members of high society. **Activate** Cast a Spell; **Effect** You expend a number of charges from the staff to cast a spell from its list.
  • **Cantrip** [_read the air_](/Spells.aspx?ID=981)
  • **1st** [_charm_](/Spells.aspx?ID=34), [_restyle_](/Spells.aspx?ID=984)
  • **2nd** [_befitting attire_](/Spells.aspx?ID=867), [_phantom crowd_](/Spells.aspx?ID=968)
  • **3rd** [_bottomless stomach_](/Spells.aspx?ID=875), [_shift blame_](/Spells.aspx?ID=997)
  • **4th** _befitting attire_, [_suggestion_](/Spells.aspx?ID=315)
  • **5th** _befitting attire_, _charm_, [_glimmer of charm_](/Spells.aspx?ID=919), _suggestion_
**Craft Requirements** Supply one casting of all listed levels of all listed spells.
name: Socialite Staff

markdown:
**Source** [Treasure Vault (Remastered)](/Sources.aspx?ID=191) pg. 134 **Usage** held in 1 hand **Bulk** 1 --- A _spellstriker staff_ is wrought iron with gleaming arcane sigils etched into its surface and a sharp point at the bottom. Used as a weapon, the staff is a _+1 [striking](/Equipment.aspx?ID=280) [shifting](/Equipment.aspx?ID=302) [staff](/Weapons.aspx?ID=12)_. **Activate** ([concentrate](/Traits.aspx?ID=561)) **Frequency** once per hour; **Trigger** You use [Spellstrike](/Actions.aspx?ID=755) with a non-cantrip spell and miss with the Strike; **Effect** An explosion of magical energy—stored up for the Spellstrike—explodes out. All creatures in a 5-foot emanation take 1d6 damage per level of the spell, with a [basic](/Rules.aspx?ID=329) Reflex save against your spell DC. This damage is the same type the spell would have dealt, and the activation gains that trait; if the spell would have dealt multiple types of damage, choose one of them. If the damage of the explosion is mental, the save is Will instead of Reflex. **Activate** Cast a Spell; **Effect** You expend a number of charges from the staff to cast a spell from its list. **Craft Requirements** You have the [magus's](/Classes.aspx?ID=17) Spellstrike activity. Supply one casting of all listed levels of all listed spells. Spellstriker Staff **Source** [Treasure Vault (Remastered)](/Sources.aspx?ID=191) pg. 134 **Price** 360 gp **Bulk** 1 ---
  • **Cantrip** [_ignition_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1565)
  • **1st** [_echoing weapon_](/Spells.aspx?ID=899), [_sure strike_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1709)
  • **2nd** [_acid grip_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1436), [_telekinetic maneuver_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1717)
Spellstriker Staff (Greater) **Source** [Treasure Vault (Remastered)](/Sources.aspx?ID=191) pg. 134 **Price** 1,400 gp **Bulk** 1 --- Used as a weapon, the staff is a _+2 striking shifting staff_.
  • **3rd** _echoing weapon_, [_haste_](/Spells.aspx?ID=147)
  • **4th** _acid grip_, [_weapon storm_](/Spells.aspx?ID=373)
Spellstriker Staff (Major) **Source** [Treasure Vault (Remastered)](/Sources.aspx?ID=191) pg. 134 **Price** 8,500 gp **Bulk** 1 --- Used as a weapon, the staff is a _+2 greater striking shifting staff_.
  • **5th** [_blink charge_](/Spells.aspx?ID=872), _echoing weapon_, [_vampiric feast_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1736)
  • **6th** _acid grip_, _weapon storm_
  • **7th** _blink charge_, [_true target_](/Spells.aspx?ID=346)
name: Spellstriker Staff

markdown:
**Source** [Treasure Vault (Remastered)](/Sources.aspx?ID=191) pg. 134 **Usage** held in 1 hand **Bulk** 1 --- In its normal form, a _spy staff_ is a slim rod of burnished wood with subtle etchings of eyes upon its sides. The first to develop the _spy staff_ were agents of Andoran's Twilight Talons, but such staves have spread to espionage agencies throughout the Inner Sea region and beyond. **Activate** ([concentrate](/Traits.aspx?ID=561)) **Effect** You change the shape and appearance of this staff to that of an ordinary handheld accessory of your choosing of the same Bulk. The staff’s statistics don’t change. Only a creature benefiting from [_truesight_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1727) or a similar effect can attempt to disbelieve this illusion, with a DC of 27. **Activate** Cast a Spell; **Effect** You expend a number of charges from the staff to cast a spell from its list. **Craft Requirements** Supply one casting of all listed levels of all listed spells. Spy Staff **Source** [Treasure Vault (Remastered)](/Sources.aspx?ID=191) pg. 134 **Price** 340 gp **Bulk** 1 ---
  • **Cantrip** [_message_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1598)
  • **1st** [_illusory disguise_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1568), [_invisible item_](/Spells.aspx?ID=2004), [_message rune_](/Spells.aspx?ID=581)
  • **2nd** [_disguise magic_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1491), [_humanoid form_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1560), _illusory disguise_
Spy Staff (Greater) **Source** [Treasure Vault (Remastered)](/Sources.aspx?ID=191) pg. 134 **Price** 1,175 gp **Bulk** 1 --- The DC to disbelieve the illusion disguising the staff is 32.
  • **3rd** [_clairaudience_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1465), _illusory disguise_, [_veil of privacy_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1739)
  • **4th** _clairvoyance_, [_peaceful bubble_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1624)
Spy Staff (Major) **Source** [Treasure Vault (Remastered)](/Sources.aspx?ID=191) pg. 134 **Price** 5,300 gp **Bulk** 1 --- The DC to disbelieve the illusion disguising the staff is 38.
  • **5th** [_mind probe_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1601), [_scouting eye_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1661)
  • **6th** [_mislead_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1605), [_scrying_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1662)
name: Spy Staff
